suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'decentration', 'diameter', 'drawCanvas', 'frameType', 'index', 'minThick', and 'power'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [decentration, diameter, drawCanvas, frameType, index, minThick, power, theme]

fix.text: [decentration, diameter, drawCanvas, frameType, index, minThick, power, theme]
